content:
The Rust Microconference for the Linux Plumbers Conference 2026 has been accepted!

  • https://lpc.events/event/20/sessions/257/

Proposals can already be submitted at:

  • https://lpc.events/event/20/abstracts/

To do so, please scroll down, click the "Submit new abstract" button and choose "Track: Rust MC". For possible topics and requirements, please see the description of the MC in the first link above.

The deadline for submitting proposals for MCs (including the Rust MC) has been announced: August 7th.

Please note that if you submit something before July 10th, you may be able to get into the pre-registration phase -- LPC registrations can run out very fast. Please see https://lpc.events/blog/current/index.php/2026/04/06/changes-to-registration-availability-for-2026/ for details.
Last reminder to submit something early enough for the LPC pre-registration on July 10th.

It is the last day to pre-register, for those that submitted something before the deadline.

Tomorrow general registration opens for everyone.

https://lpc.events/blog/current/index.php/2026/04/06/changes-to-registration-availability-for-2026/
